findings.description: The property name `contentPathRewriteRules` (as used in the XML configuration example in both source and knowledge file s4) is missing from s4 hints. Only `contentsPathRewriteRules` (the table form) is listed. The source contains an inconsistency between the table name (`contentsPathRewriteRules`) and the XML example name (`contentPathRewriteRules`), so both forms should be searchable via hints.
findings.source_evidence: Source table: `contentsPathRewriteRules` / Source XML example: `<property name="contentPathRewriteRules">` / Knowledge file s4 XML: `<property name="contentPathRewriteRules">`
